senses.definition: an electrical equipment used to keep food and drinks cool and fresh

examples.x: I put leftovers in the refrigerator to save them for later.
My mom keeps fruits and vegetables fresh in the refrigerator.

senses.definition: an electrical container that can store food for a long time at a temperature that is very low

examples.x: She stored the meat in the freezer to keep it fresh.
The freezer is full of frozen vegetables and ice cream.
He bought a chest freezer for additional storage.
The freezer door was left open, causing the food to thaw.
He found an old pack of berries at the back of the freezer.

senses.definition: a piece of equipment used for cooking or heating food that contains an oven
a kitchen appliance that uses electricity to quickly heat or cook food

examples.x: She quickly heated up leftovers in the microwave for a quick lunch before heading back to work.
The microwave has a defrost setting that makes it easy to prepare frozen food in no time.
He was amazed at how the microwave could cook a potato in just a few minutes.
Always be careful when removing items from the microwave, as they can be very hot.
The kitchen is equipped with a new microwave that has multiple settings for cooking and reheating food.

senses.definition: a machine used for making coffee

examples.x: She cleaned the coffee maker's filter to remove any coffee residue.
She used a paper filter in the coffee maker to prevent grounds from getting into the coffee.
She uses a coffee maker every morning to brew her favorite coffee.
The coffee maker makes a sound when the brewing process is complete.
The coffee maker's warming plate keeps the coffee hot until you're ready to drink it.

senses.definition: an electrical device used to blend, mix, or puree food and liquids into a smooth consistency

examples.x: She used the blender to make a fruit smoothie with bananas, strawberries, and yogurt.
The chef used a blender to puree the soup until it was silky smooth.
He enjoys making homemade sauces and dips using his high-speed blender.
The blender is essential for creating frozen cocktails and beverages at parties.
A powerful blender can crush ice and blend ingredients for refreshing frozen drinks in seconds.

senses.definition: an electric kitchen appliance used to chop, slice, shred, or puree food

examples.x: She used the food processor to blend the ingredients for the soup.
The food processor made slicing vegetables much faster.
He bought a food processor to make homemade sauces and dips.
The recipe suggests using a food processor to shred the carrots.
She added nuts to the food processor to make a creamy paste.

senses.definition: an electric kitchen tool used for removing the juice of fruits and vegetables

examples.x: She used the juicer to make fresh orange juice.
The juicer is easy to clean after extracting juice.
He bought a juicer to include more fruits in his diet.
The juicer quickly turned the carrots into a smooth drink.
She made a healthy smoothie using the juicer and blender.

senses.definition: an electric appliance which is used for cooking meat or vegetables at a low temperature in liquid
a kitchen appliance used for boiling water quickly and efficiently, usually made of metal or plastic and equipped with a heating element, a water-level indicator, and an automatic shut-off feature

examples.x: I use an electric kettle every morning to quickly boil water for my tea.
The electric kettle is more energy-efficient than boiling water on the stove.
She filled the electric kettle with water and turned it on to prepare coffee.
We used the electric kettle to prepare hot water for making instant noodles.
I bought a new electric kettle because my old one was taking too long to heat up.

senses.definition: a kitchen appliance used for mixing, kneading, and whisking ingredients, featuring a motorized unit with a rotating attachment and a bowl that sits on a stand

examples.x: She used the stand mixer to prepare the dough for her famous bread recipe.
After the batter was mixed, I attached the whisk to the stand mixer to beat the eggs.
I love how the stand mixer automatically kneads the dough, so I don’t have to do it by hand.
Using the stand mixer, she quickly whipped up a batch of cookies for the party.

senses.definition: a kitchen appliance designed for making bread, featuring a built-in mixing and kneading mechanism, a heating element, and a baking pan

examples.x: She used the bread maker to prepare fresh loaves every morning.
I added some extra seeds to the dough in the bread maker for a healthy twist.
After setting the bread maker, I can leave it to bake while I do other things.
The bread maker is perfect for making homemade pizza dough.
He gifted me a bread maker for my birthday, and now I bake bread regularly.

senses.definition: a kitchen appliance for automatic rice cooking
a kitchen appliance used for deep frying food items by immersing them in hot oil or fat
a machine used for producing ice cubes, typically found in refrigerators or as standalone units

examples.x: The ice maker in the refrigerator is working perfectly, so we always have fresh ice ready for drinks.
She noticed that the ice maker wasn't working, so she called a technician to fix it.
I cleaned the ice maker this morning, and now it's making ice faster than ever.
The ice maker in the office kitchen runs nonstop during summer to keep up with everyone's cold drink requests.

senses.definition: a box-shaped piece of equipment with a front door that is usually part of a stove, used for baking, cooking, or heating food

examples.x: He used the oven's timer to remind him to check on the cookies.
She accidentally burned her hand while reaching into the hot oven.
The oven's temperature knob can be adjusted for precise cooking.
They roasted a whole chicken in the oven for Sunday dinner.

senses.definition: a pot that has a tight lid and can quickly cook food using high-pressure steam

examples.x: She used a pressure cooker to make a stew in under an hour.
The pressure cooker reduces cooking time significantly.
Always release the steam safely when using a pressure cooker.
He prepared tender meat using the pressure cooker.
He learned to use the pressure cooker by following online tutorials.

senses.definition: a machine used for freezing and mixing ice cream, sorbet, and frozen yogurt, with a motorized unit, a mixing paddle, and a container for the mixture

examples.x: The ice cream maker churned the mixture until it was smooth and ready to serve.
She used her new ice cream maker to create a batch of vanilla bean ice cream for dessert.
The ice cream maker came with a recipe book full of ideas for frozen desserts.
After assembling the ice cream maker, he poured in the ingredients and set the timer.
Using the ice cream maker, he made a dairy-free sorbet with fresh berries.

senses.definition: a kitchen appliance used for grilling food, typically featuring a heating element that is powered by electricity and can be used indoors or outdoors, with a cooking surface made of metal or ceramic

examples.x: The electric grill is perfect for making burgers and grilled vegetables indoors.
She used her electric grill to cook chicken breasts quickly for dinner.
An electric grill is a great option for apartments where outdoor grilling is not allowed.
He adjusted the temperature on the electric grill to make sure the steak cooked evenly.
They enjoyed using their electric grill during the winter when outdoor barbecues were not possible.

senses.definition: a kitchen appliance that uses hot air circulation to cook food quickly and evenly
a kitchen appliance used for drying and preserving food, typically featuring trays or shelves for placing sliced or chopped food

examples.x: The food dehydrator worked overnight to turn fresh apples into delicious dried apple slices.
She used her food dehydrator to dry herbs from her garden for cooking throughout the year.
Making fruit leather is easy with a food dehydrator and a simple puree of fresh fruit.
A food dehydrator is perfect for making homemade beef jerky with your favorite seasonings.
The chef used a food dehydrator to create crispy garnishes for the restaurant's signature dishes.

senses.definition: a device or appliance that provides a convenient source of drinking water
a machine that cuts meat into very small pieces
a portable kitchen appliance used for mixing and blending ingredients, typically featuring a motorized body with a handle, one or two beaters or whisks, and speed controls

examples.x: The handheld mixer is perfect for whipping cream quickly and evenly.
She used the handheld mixer to blend the cake batter until it was smooth.
After adding the eggs, he grabbed the handheld mixer to combine all the ingredients.
Using the handheld mixer, they were able to make a fluffy meringue for the pie topping.

senses.definition: a machine that brews coffee by forcing water near boiling point through ground coffee and a filter to produce a thick, concentrated coffee called espresso
an electrical appliance, designed like a small oven that can function as an oven or a toaster

examples.x: She uses a toaster oven to quickly toast her bread in the morning.
The toaster oven's compact size makes it ideal for small kitchens.
The toaster oven's door should be closed tightly during cooking to retain heat.
They bought a toaster oven with a digital display for precise cooking.
They used the toaster oven to make open-faced sandwiches for lunch.

senses.definition: a multifunctional kitchen appliance that combines the functions of both a blender and a food processor in one unit

examples.x: She used her blender food processor combo to make fresh salsa and a creamy sauce.
The blender food processor combo made it easy to prepare smoothies and chop vegetables for dinner.
The convenience of the blender food processor combo saves time when preparing large meals.
He made a smoothie and shredded cheese with a single blender food processor combo.

senses.definition: a kitchen appliance that automatically opens cans using a motorized blade to cut through the lid, making it a convenient alternative to manual can openers

examples.x: I use my electric can opener every day to quickly prepare meals.
The electric can opener made it easier for him to open cans without straining his hands.
I love how my electric can opener automatically stops when the lid is fully cut.
The electric can opener is a must-have in the kitchen, especially for anyone with arthritis.

senses.definition: a device that uses hot air or oil to pop kernels of corn into popcorn

examples.x: I just bought a popcorn maker so we can make fresh snacks during movie night.
For the party, we set up a popcorn maker on the counter for guests to enjoy.
She loves using her popcorn maker to make popcorn for her kids after school.
The new popcorn maker I got for Christmas is so easy to clean and works quickly.

senses.definition: a kitchen appliance that is used to smoke food, such as meats, fish, and vegetables, using wood chips or other smoking materials

examples.x: The indoor smoker is perfect for making smoked ribs even when it is too cold to grill outside.
After using the indoor smoker, I found it to be a convenient way to enjoy smoked food year-round.
We tried using the indoor smoker to prepare smoked chicken, and the results were delicious.
I bought an indoor smoker because I live in an apartment and cannot use a traditional grill.

senses.definition: a refrigeration unit designed specifically to store and chill wine bottles at the optimal temperature
a device used to keep beverages, such as sodas, juices, and energy drinks, at a cool and consistent temperature

examples.x: I placed the soda cans in the beverage cooler to keep them cold for the party.
The beverage cooler in the office breakroom is always stocked with water and juice.
He set up a beverage cooler near the patio to keep drinks chilled for the barbecue.
The beverage cooler keeps my drinks at the perfect temperature for hours.
I need to find a beverage cooler with more space to store all the drinks for the event.

senses.definition: a device that is used to brew tea by steeping tea leaves or tea bags in hot water

examples.x: The tea maker quickly brewed my favorite green tea with the perfect temperature.
She used the tea maker to prepare a pot of herbal tea before breakfast.
I forgot to turn off the tea maker, but it automatically shut off after the tea was ready.
The tea maker is a great addition to my kitchen, making it simple to enjoy tea any time of day.
He bought a new tea maker that keeps the tea warm for hours after it's brewed.

senses.definition: an electrical device fixed above the stove that can remove smoke, steam, or unpleasant smells in the kitchen

examples.x: The chef turned on the range hood to clear the smoke while cooking.
A powerful range hood is essential in the kitchen to keep the air fresh.
The range hood filtered out the strong smell of garlic and onions from the cooking process.
After frying the fish, I always run the range hood to remove the lingering odor.
The range hood lights helped me see better while cooking dinner late at night.

senses.definition: a portable electric appliance used for cooking or heating food and liquids
a kitchen appliance used for making pasta from scratch, typically by rolling and cutting dough to create various types of pasta shapes

examples.x: She used a pasta maker to roll out the dough and create fresh fettuccine for dinner.
The kitchen was filled with the smell of fresh pasta, thanks to the new pasta maker.
I love using my pasta maker to make lasagna noodles from scratch.
After buying a pasta maker, he started experimenting with different types of pasta for family meals.

senses.definition: a kitchen appliance designed to boil or steam eggs to a desired level of doneness

examples.x: The egg cooker made breakfast so much easier this morning.
She loves her egg cooker because it cooks eggs just the way she likes them.
With an egg cooker, you can have perfectly cooked eggs every time.
I used the egg cooker to make perfect soft-boiled eggs for my salad.

senses.definition: a kitchen tool that uses an electric motor to power two serrated blades that move back and forth to quickly and easily cut through meats, breads, and other foods

examples.x: She used an electric knife to carve the turkey for Thanksgiving dinner.
The electric knife made slicing the roast beef much easier.
He pulled out the electric knife to cut through the dense bread loaf.
For the holiday meal, the chef used an electric knife to quickly prepare the meat.
I prefer using an electric knife when I need to slice a large ham evenly.

senses.definition: the part of a stove used for cooking under direct heat
a kitchen appliance used for toasting and grilling sandwiches

examples.x: I used the sandwich maker to prepare a quick lunch today.
She made a turkey and cheese sandwich in the sandwich maker for breakfast.
He loves using the sandwich maker to make hot sandwiches with all his favorite fillings.
For a simple snack, I just put some bread and ham in the sandwich maker.
The sandwich maker grilled the cheese perfectly, making it crispy on the outside.

senses.definition: an oven in which hot air moves around, using its fan, to heat all sides of the food inside
a container with small holes used for cooking food in steam by putting it over a saucepan of boiling water
an electronic device used in the kitchen to make toast

examples.x: They bought a new toaster that could toast four slices at once.
The toaster had a setting for different levels of browning.
The toaster popped up with the toast perfectly browned.
She spread butter on the hot toast straight from the toaster.
He forgot to unplug the toaster after making breakfast.

senses.definition: a machine used for crushing or breaking food such as pepper, coffee, etc. into powder or very small pieces
a kitchen appliance that is used for mixing, beating, and whisking ingredients in food preparation
a kitchen appliance used for slicing meat or other foods into thin, even slices.
a type of coffee grinder that uses burrs to crush coffee beans into consistent particle sizes for brewing
an electric table-top cooker that uses radiant heat from the lid and sides to cook food
a kitchen appliance used to heat and fry foods in hot oil, often used for making fried foods such as French fries, chicken, and fish
a kitchen appliance used to blend fruits, vegetables, and other ingredients into smoothies
a kitchen appliance used to cook waffle batter between two hot plates, creating crispy, grid-patterned waffles
an electric machine that is used to clean dishes, spoons, cups, etc.

examples.x: He pressed the "start" button on the dishwasher and walked away.
She loaded the dirty dishes into the dishwasher after dinner.
The dishwasher is energy-efficient, saving water and electricity.
The dishwasher's control panel has intuitive buttons for easy operation.
The new dishwasher has a quick wash cycle for small loads.

senses.definition: a special grinding machine that crushes grain into flour
